name: D+Q AD-risk cognition and mobility exploratory result

effect.raw_text: The pilot reported cognition and mobility measures, but current knowledge-base status treats the evidence as exploratory.

statement: The AD-risk pilot contributes early human functional evidence but should not be upgraded without controlled, larger, outcome-level evidence.
caveats: Small pilot sample.
Functional endpoints require separate extraction and adjudication.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: D+Q 20-week adverse-event aggregate result

group_values.group_label: D+Q participants with other adverse events
Untreated-control participants with other adverse events
D+Q participants with serious adverse events
Untreated-control participants with serious adverse events

effect.raw_text: ClinicalTrials.gov adverseEventsModule reports 23/30 D+Q participants and 5/30 untreated-control participants with other adverse events; serious adverse events and deaths were 0/30 in both groups.

provenance.locator: PubMed abstract serious adverse event sentence
provenance.note: Abstract reports no serious adverse events were observed.

statement: D+Q had no posted serious adverse events or deaths in the registry aggregate counts, but other adverse events were more common in the D+Q arm than untreated control.
caveats: This aggregate record does not enumerate every adverse-event preferred term.
Safety interpretation should include event-specific extraction before a formal safety synthesis.

name: D+Q 20-week BMD descriptive result

effect.raw_text: ClinicalTrials.gov posts BMD group medians by DXA site but no pairwise D+Q versus control p-value in this outcome module.

analysis.comparison: D+Q versus untreated control by DXA site
analysis.effect_note: No pairwise analysis was posted in the ClinicalTrials.gov BMD outcome module.

provenance.note: Posted BMD group values by lumbar spine, femoral neck, and radius classes.

statement: The posted registry BMD module provides D+Q and control group values by site, but no pairwise analysis is posted for the overall BMD outcome.
caveats: BMD site-specific values should not be pooled without separate site-level outcomes.
PubMed abstract reports an exploratory radius BMD subgroup signal in high-senescent-cell-burden participants, which is not the same as this overall registry-posted BMD summary.

name: D+Q 20-week CTx primary outcome null result

effect.raw_text: ClinicalTrials.gov posted median percent change values for CTx at 20 weeks; D+Q versus untreated control superiority analysis p=0.611 by Wilcoxon (Mann-Whitney).

analysis.effect_note: No statistically significant D+Q effect on primary 20-week CTx outcome in the overall group.

provenance.note: Posted primary outcome group values and D+Q versus control p-value.
Abstract confirms primary CTx endpoint did not differ between groups.

statement: D+Q did not significantly change the primary 20-week CTx bone resorption marker versus untreated control.
caveats: Registry dispersion is full range; PubMed abstract reports interquartile ranges, so effect extraction should keep source-specific dispersion labels separate.
This result applies to the overall D+Q versus untreated-control comparison, not exploratory high-senescent-cell-burden subgroup analyses.

name: D+Q 20-week P1NP null secondary result

effect.raw_text: ClinicalTrials.gov posted median percent change values for P1NP at 20 weeks; D+Q versus untreated control superiority analysis p=0.149.

analysis.effect_note: No statistically significant D+Q effect on P1NP at 20 weeks.

provenance.note: Posted secondary outcome group values and D+Q versus control p-value.

provenance.locator: PubMed abstract P1NP secondary endpoint sentence
provenance.note: Abstract reports P1NP was not different from control at 20 weeks.

statement: D+Q did not significantly change P1NP versus untreated control at 20 weeks.
caveats: This later secondary endpoint contrasts with nominal short-term P1NP signals at 2 and 4 weeks.

name: D+Q 2-week P1NP positive secondary result

effect.raw_text: Registry medians were D+Q 0.8 and control -15.2; PubMed abstract describes a +16% increase relative to control at 2 weeks.

analysis.effect_note: Nominally significant secondary P1NP increase at 2 weeks.

provenance.note: Posted secondary outcome group values and D+Q versus control p-value.

provenance.locator: PubMed abstract P1NP secondary endpoint sentence
provenance.note: Abstract reports +16% relative to control and P=0.020 at 2 weeks.

statement: D+Q increased the secondary P1NP bone formation marker versus untreated control at 2 weeks.
caveats: Secondary endpoint; do not treat as overturning the null primary CTx result.
Registry provides full-range dispersion; abstract reports relative difference.

name: D+Q 4-week P1NP positive secondary result

effect.raw_text: Registry medians were D+Q 4.2 and control -12.1; PubMed abstract describes a +16% increase relative to control at 4 weeks.

analysis.effect_note: Nominally significant secondary P1NP increase at 4 weeks.

provenance.note: Posted secondary outcome group values and D+Q versus control p-value.

provenance.locator: PubMed abstract P1NP secondary endpoint sentence
provenance.note: Abstract reports +16% relative to control and P=0.024 at 4 weeks.

statement: D+Q increased the secondary P1NP bone formation marker versus untreated control at 4 weeks.
caveats: Secondary endpoint; do not treat as overturning the null primary CTx result.
The registry full range for D+Q is wide, including an upper limit of 1480.

name: D+Q 2-week SASP null result

effect.raw_text: ClinicalTrials.gov posted median SASP percent change values for D+Q and untreated control; D+Q versus untreated control p=0.953.

analysis.effect_note: No statistically significant D+Q effect on posted 2-week SASP measure.

provenance.note: Posted SASP outcome group values and D+Q versus control p-value.

statement: D+Q did not significantly change the posted 2-week plasma SASP measure versus untreated control.
caveats: The registry outcome description is broad; marker-level details should be checked against the publication before mechanistic synthesis.

name: D+Q postmenopausal bone trial mixed biomarker result

effect.raw_text: The study should be represented as mixed pending outcome-level extraction of primary endpoint, subgroup, and biomarker results.

statement: This aggregate triage result is retained only as a summary pointer; source-located extracted results now separate CTx, P1NP timepoints, SASP, BMD, and adverse-event outcomes.
caveats: Needs exact endpoint-level quantitative extraction.
Subgroup findings should remain labeled exploratory unless prespecified status is verified.

provenance.note: Triage-level aggregate pointer; do not use for synthesis when exact registry_extracted result records are available.

name: D+Q diabetic kidney disease senescence biomarker result
comparator: Within-participant baseline or pilot-study comparator structure

effect.raw_text: Reported decreases in senescent-cell and SASP-related biomarkers after intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin.

statement: The result is an early human biomarker signal and should not be interpreted as a clinical benefit claim.
time_horizon: Short-course intermittent treatment and post-treatment biomarker assessment
caveats: Small preliminary study.
Needs full quantitative extraction and risk-of-bias review before synthesis.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: D+Q IPF feasibility and tolerability mixed result
comparator: Placebo control in a small randomized pilot

effect.raw_text: The pilot primarily informs feasibility, tolerability, and safety-boundary interpretation rather than definitive efficacy.

statement: The IPF randomized pilot should be used as safety and feasibility evidence unless later extraction verifies a powered efficacy outcome.
caveats: Small pilot sample.
Disease-specific IPF outcomes do not establish general longevity benefit.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: D+Q old mouse post-treatment survival positive result

effect.raw_text: Reported increased post-treatment survival in old mice after intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin.

statement: Preclinical survival evidence supports D+Q as an animal healthspan/lifespan signal, not as human aging efficacy.
caveats: Requires separate quantitative extraction before effect-size synthesis.
Do not pool with human clinical endpoints.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: SToMP-AD no posted results
statement: NCT04685590 is a trial-watch record with no posted result at the checked registry update, so it contributes no effect evidence.
caveats: Requires surveillance for posted results or linked publication.

provenance.note: No posted results at checked registry update; not an extracted treatment effect.

name: Fisetin vascular trial no posted results
statement: NCT06133634 is a trial-watch record with no posted result at the checked registry update, so it contributes no effect evidence.
caveats: Requires surveillance for posted results or linked publication.

provenance.note: No posted results at checked registry update; not an extracted treatment effect.
